executeQueryParams.query: INSERT INTO products    (product_name, category, current_stock, minimum_stock, supplier_name, supplier_email,  expiration_date, temperature, humidity) VALUES    (     '{{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.product_name}}',     '{{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.category}}',     {{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.current_stock}},     {{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.minimum_stock}},     '{{outputs.WebhookProduct.body.supplier_name}}',     '{{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.supplier_email}}',   '{{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.expiration_date}}',     {{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.temperature}},     {{outputs.WebhookProduct.success.body.humidity}}   );

executeQueryParams.query: INSERT INTO purchases (   product_id,   product_name,   quantity_ordered,   supplier_name,   supplier_email,   status,   message ) VALUES (   {{outputs.WebhookAchat.success.body.product_id}},   '{{outputs.WebhookAchat.success.body.product_name}}',   {{outputs.WebhookAchat.success.body.quantity_ordered}},   '{{outputs.WebhookAchat.success.body.supplier_name}}',   '{{outputs.WebhookAchat.success.body.supplier_email}}',   '{{outputs.WebhookAchat.success.body.status}}',   '{{outputs.WebhookAchat.success.body.message}}' );

data.description: Execute PostgreSQL operations (select, insert, update, delete)
data.name: postgres action
data.label: selectAllProducts

executeQueryParams.query: SELECT   id,   product_name,   category,   current_stock,   minimum_stock,   supplier_name,   supplier_email,   temperature,   humidity,   created_at,    CASE     WHEN current_stock = 0 THEN 'RUPTURE'     WHEN current_stock <= minimum_stock THEN 'COMMANDER'     ELSE 'OK'   END AS stock_status,    CASE     WHEN current_stock = 0 THEN 'RED'     WHEN current_stock <= minimum_stock THEN 'ORANGE'     ELSE 'GREEN'   END AS stock_color  FROM products ORDER BY current_stock ASC;

data.description: Execute PostgreSQL operations (select, insert, update, delete)
data.name: postgres action
data.label: selectPurchase

executeQueryParams.query: SELECT   id,   product_name,   quantity_ordered,   supplier_name,   supplier_email,   status,   message,   created_at FROM purchases ORDER BY created_at DESC;

data.description: Execute PostgreSQL operations (select, insert, update, delete)
data.name: postgres action
data.label: updatequantity

executeQueryParams.query: UPDATE products SET current_stock =   CASE     WHEN '{{outputs.WebhookVente.success.body.type}}' = 'OUT'       THEN current_stock - {{outputs.WebhookVente.success.body.quantity}}     WHEN '{{outputs.WebhookVente.success.body.type}}' = 'IN'       THEN current_stock + {{outputs.WebhookVente.success.body.quantity}}     ELSE current_stock   END WHERE product_name = '{{outputs.WebhookVente.success.body.product_name}}' AND (   '{{outputs.WebhookVente.success.body.type}}' = 'IN'   OR current_stock >= {{outputs.WebhookVente.success.body.quantity}} );

data.description: Execute PostgreSQL operations (select, insert, update, delete)
data.name: postgres action
data.label: StockMovement

executeQueryParams.query: SELECT   product_name,   SUM(quantity) AS total_sold_7_days,   ROUND(SUM(quantity) / 7.0, 2) AS avg_daily_demand FROM stock_movements WHERE movement_type = 'OUT' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY product_name;

data.description: An AI agent that can perform tasks using nodes as tools based on user input.
data.name: agent
data.label: Agent

parameters.systemPrompt:
You are a smart supply forecast agent.

Analyze the products data below and decide the correct path for each product.

Rules:
1. If current_stock <= minimum_stock OR days_before_rupture <= 3:
   path = "ALERT_STOCK"
   reason: product is near rupture or already below minimum stock.
   action: recommend creating a supplier order.

2. If total_sold_7_days >= 10 OR avg_daily_demand is high compared to stock:
   path = "TENDANCE"
   reason: product is trending this week.
   action: monitor and prepare order if needed.

si normal ne pas returner
Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown.

Expected JSON format sans backtick:
{
  "Alert_Stock": 
    {
      "product_id": 1,
      "product_name": "pc hp",
      "path": "ALERT_STOCK",
      "risk_level": "HIGH",
      "reason": "Stock may run out in 1 day.",
      "recommended_order_quantity": 198,
      "supplier_name": "tecno",
      "supplier_email": "email@example.com"
    }
  "TENDANCE": 
    {
      "product_id": ..,
      "product_name": "..",
      "path": "...",
      "risk_level": "...",
      "reason": ".....",
      "recommended_order_quantity": ...,
      "supplier_name": "....",
      "supplier_email": "...."
    }
  
}

Products data:
{{outputs.FunctionOrganiser.success.productsJson}}
